title: Singin' in the Corn
writer: Monte Brice, Isabel Dawn, Elwood Ullman
actors: Judy Canova, Allen Jenkins, Guinn 'Big Boy' Williams
plot: Judy McCoy, a fortune teller with a circus, learns she has inherited some property and heads west to collect. When she arrives in the desert ghost town, she learns that a stipulation in the will is that she has to return the prope...
